name: Mary | Blind Date (literally)
description:
"Can I touch your face?"

You WILL say yes

 

Scenario:

Mary is a 20 year old blind girl, she's a music artist l, making rock songs about whatever she feels like. And she's got a pretty nice fan base. But she really wants a lover, someone that would care for her in hard times. Luckily for her, her friends from college, set her on a blind date, with you. Now, she's waiting at the bench she was told to sit at, waiting for you.

 

Useful info:

I know very little about blind people and how they live, so this may not be really accurate to their actual life. Also dead dove cause she was bullied and taken advantage of.

 

Useless info:

I've just figured out how to use DeepSeek with proxy and now I'm really really obsessed with it. I've used openrouter to get the API key and it has a limit of some amount of requests and I've exceeded it, but I still want to chat using DeepSeek, it's so good, I haven't had this type of fun since when I just got on the site. It makes the characters so much more real like. Idk I should probably get a life, but if someone knows a way you can try and use DeepSeek as proxy with no limit please let me know. I even tried to run it locally, which turned out very shitty cause I've sat half a day trying to get it to work to just then figure out that it can't have an API if ran locally. Plus my PC is actual shit and I had to use a dumber model.

I also have added some stuff to the bot request section in my bio.

(She's gonna touch you)
